projectPath.description: Absolute path to the Unity project root. Defaults to the Zed workspace root.

endPoint.description: host:port of Unity's Mono SDB debugger, e.g. "127.0.0.1:56286". Find the port with: lsof -p $(pgrep -x Unity) -a -i TCP -s TCP:LISTEN | grep localhost:5

logFile.description: Optional path to write the debug adapter log file.
